projectDescription: A Windows desktop application that lets you adjust the brightness and contrast of multiple monitors — including external DDC/CI-enabled displays — from the system tray.
keyFeatures: Adjust brightness of multiple monitors (internal and external DDC/CI) from the system tray
Unison mode to change all monitor brightness simultaneously
Customizable brightness and contrast ranges per monitor
SDR content brightness adjustment for HDR displays
Command-line interface for get/set brightness and contrast (add-on)
Hot keys and shortcut keys for brightness/contrast control (add-on)
Conditional, time-based, and key-triggered automation commands (add-on)
Precision touchpad and mouse wheel support
publicApiSurface: /get [Device Instance ID] — Get brightness of a monitor
/get all — Get brightness of all monitors
/set all [Brightness] — Set brightness of all monitors
/get contrast [Device Instance ID] — Get contrast of a monitor
/set contrast [Device Instance ID] [Value] — Set contrast of a monitor
/get input [Device Instance ID] — Get input source of a monitor
/load [file path] — Load commands from a JSON file
/preclude [Device Instance ID] — Exclude a monitor from detection
/preclear [Device Instance ID] — Force-include a monitor bypassing capability check
Conditional Commands JSON (SetBrightness, SetContrast triggered by monitor brightness condition)
Time Commands JSON (SetBrightness, SetContrast triggered at scheduled daily times)
Key Commands JSON (SetBrightness, SetContrast, SetInput, IncrementBrightness, DecrementBrightness triggered by hot key)
